title: Trans Memoria
overview: Victoria travels back in time to understand what defines her as a woman and is confronted with the unresolved grief of losing her friend Méril. As she shares her pain and the memories of her surgery with Athena and Aamina, who now stand where she once stood, the three of them begin a journey to face the ghosts of the past and search for a better future.
